 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-l85v","title":"TEST: fcp-security Unit Test Suite","description":"# TEST: fcp-security Unit Test Suite

## Scope
Comprehensive unit tests for security testing and audit framework.

## Test Categories

### Capability Token Validation
- [ ] Ed25519 signature verification
- [ ] Token expiration checks
- [ ] Issuer/audience validation
- [ ] Capability scope enforcement
- [ ] Resource constraint validation

### Zone Security
- [ ] Zone boundary enforcement
- [ ] Trust level validation
- [ ] Cross-zone access denial
- [ ] Zone hierarchy traversal

### Provenance Tracking
- [ ] Taint label propagation
- [ ] Origin tracking
- [ ] Causal chain verification

### Input Validation
- [ ] SQL injection patterns
- [ ] XSS patterns
- [ ] Command injection patterns
- [ ] Path traversal patterns
- [ ] SSRF patterns

### Cryptographic Operations
- [ ] Key generation
- [ ] Signature creation/verification
- [ ] Secure random generation
- [ ] Constant-time comparisons

### Audit Logging
- [ ] Security event capture
- [ ] Tamper-evident logging
- [ ] Correlation ID tracking

## Coverage Target: >98% (security-critical)","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:12:48.845571789-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T12:21:35.908437757-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-l85v","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-1j7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:21:35.936768789-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"flywheel_connectors-lib","title":"fcp.zendesk: Customer Lookup","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:21:48.246203316-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T10:21:48.246203316-05:00"}
-{"id":"flywheel_connectors-lj2","title":"fcp-oauth: Shared OAuth2/OAuth1 Authentication Library","description":"# fcp-oauth: Shared OAuth2/OAuth1 Authentication Library

## Overview
Unified OAuth library supporting OAuth 2.0 (authorization code, client credentials, PKCE) and OAuth 1.0a flows for connectors requiring user authorization.

## Supported Flows

### OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code (with PKCE)
- Authorization URL generation
- State parameter for CSRF protection
- PKCE challenge/verifier
- Token exchange
- Refresh token handling

### OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials
- Service-to-service authentication
- Token caching with TTL
- Automatic refresh

### OAuth 1.0a (Twitter legacy)
- Request token acquisition
- User authorization
- Access token exchange
- HMAC-SHA1 signature generation

## Token Management
- In-memory token storage (no disk!)
- Automatic refresh before expiry
- Token validation
- Secure token handling

## Provider Support
- Google (OAuth 2.0 + PKCE)
- GitHub (OAuth 2.0)
- Twitter/X (OAuth 1.0a + OAuth 2.0)
- Slack (OAuth 2.0)
- Notion (OAuth 2.0)
- Linear (OAuth 2.0)
- Custom providers via configuration

## Security
- State parameter validation
- PKCE enforcement where supported
- Secure redirect URI handling
- Token encryption at rest

## Dependencies
- reqwest, serde_json, chrono, base64
- fcp-core (for FCP integration)","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:35:45.591389925-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T13:04:58.717112537-05:00"}

Unified OAuth library supporting OAuth 2.0 (authorization code, client credentials, PKCE) and OAuth 1.0a flows for connectors requiring user authorization.

### OAuth 1.0a (Twitter legacy)
- Request token acquisition
- User authorization
- Access token exchange
- HMAC-SHA1 signature generation

## Token Management
- In-memory token storage (no disk!)

- Token validation
- Secure token handling

## Provider Support
- Google (OAuth 2.0 + PKCE)
- GitHub (OAuth 2.0)
- Twitter/X (OAuth 1.0a + OAuth 2.0)
- Slack (OAuth 2.0)
- Notion (OAuth 2.0)
- Linear (OAuth 2.0)
- Custom providers via configuration

## Security
- State parameter validation
- PKCE enforcement where supported
- Secure redirect URI handling
- Token encryption at rest

## Dependencies

- fcp-core (for FCP integration)","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2026-01-11T10:35:45.591389925-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T13:38:26.814607347-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-11T13:38:26.814607347-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented fcp-oauth crate with OAuth 2.0 (authorization code + PKCE, client credentials), OAuth 1.0a, token management, and pre-configured providers.  {"id":"flywheel_connectors-lte5","title":"TEST: fcp-webhook Unit Test Suite","description":"# TEST: fcp-webhook Unit Test Suite

## Scope
Comprehensive unit tests for webhook handling library.

## Test Categories

### Signature Verification
- [ ] HMAC-SHA256 verification (Stripe, GitHub, etc.)
- [ ] Ed25519 signature verification
- [ ] Timestamp validation (replay attack prevention)
- [ ] Multiple signature schemes
- [ ] Invalid signature rejection

### Webhook Parsing
- [ ] JSON payload parsing
- [ ] Form-encoded payload parsing
- [ ] Content-Type handling
- [ ] Charset handling

### Event Routing
- [ ] Event type dispatch
- [ ] Wildcard subscriptions
- [ ] Event filtering

### Delivery Management
- [ ] Idempotency handling (deduplication)
- [ ] Event ordering guarantees
- [ ] Retry scheduling for failed processing
- [ ] Dead letter queue handling

### Security
- [ ] IP allowlist verification
- [ ] TLS certificate validation
- [ ] Request size limits
- [ ] Timeout enforcement

## Mocking Strategy
- Generate valid/invalid webhook payloads
- Mock signature generation with known keys
- Test various provider formats (GitHub, Stripe, Slack, etc.)

## Coverage Target: >95%","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:12:36.431123151-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-11T12:21:14.20592485-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"flywheel_connectors-lte5","depends_on_id":"flywheel_connectors-vi7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-11T12:21:14.23447823-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
